Subject: RE: Guam Information
Message:
Stan,
I am very comfortable delivering the message and I also understand from an earlier chat with Jim that we need to deliver a "related party" perception caution message to him.  I just didn't want to do it until we had all reached consensus that this was the way to go.  If that is the agreement of the team, I'm happy to be the messanger; I will deliver it politely in full respect of the existing relationship.

I will wait to hear from Jeff on your email to him.

Many
